ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the search engine */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the search result */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion provided by the search engine */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., search, click, suggestion) */,
  "result_position" INTEGER /* Position of the result in the search results */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the page in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the search engine */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics data (e.g., page views, clicks, time spent on page) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "time_spent_on_page" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the page in seconds */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the page */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the page */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
